name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
How to use this calculator:

Just type a math expression and I'll evaluate it.

Operators: + - * / ^ %
Functions: sin cos tan log sqrt abs floor ceil round
Constants: pi e
Grouping: (parentheses)

Examples:
  2 + 2
  sin(pi/2)
  sqrt(144)
  2^10

In groups, send /calc followed by your expression.

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
